candidates.why: Generic revenue line but there are more detailed and a total revenue line available; less ideal than explicit total.
Component of revenue, not total top-line; should not be used for overall REVT when Total Revenue exists.
Major component of revenue but excludes product services; less suitable than Total Revenue for consolidated top-line.
Component of revenue related to product services; not the overall top-line.
Subcomponent/restatement of product services revenue; not consolidated top-line.
Explicit consolidated revenue line that sums all revenue components; best representation of top-line sales.
This is a cost line, not revenue; should not be used for REVT.

variables.notes: Using explicit total revenue line as consolidated top-line.

candidates.why: Explicitly labeled as cost of revenues/COGS; matches definition of cost of goods sold / cost of sales.

variables.notes: Directly mapped from clearly labeled COGS line.

candidates.why: Classic SG&A-type overhead expense; matches SG&A definition and is not a total/subtotal; best primary SG&A component.
Mixed operating expense/income line; includes income components and is netted; less clean as SG&A but could contain some overhead.
Appears to be an unused/duplicate placeholder with no data; ambiguous and net of income/expense, so not ideal for SG&A.
Operating costs of vessels; likely more akin to operating/production costs (similar to COGS) than SG&A overhead.
Balance sheet liability, not an income statement expense line; should not be used for SG&A expense mapping.

variables.notes: Explicit G&A row exists and is populated; per hierarchy, use this single SG&A component rather than broader operating cost buckets.
No R&D-related candidate rows provided; treat R&D expense as missing/zero.

candidates.row_label: Remeasurement of equity interest in joint venture
candidates.why: Valuation/remeasurement item, not interest expense.
Main interest expense line; appears to aggregate lease and non-lease interest; best single representation of total interest expense.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Component of interest related to lease liabilities; narrower than total interest expense.
Component of interest excluding lease; does not capture full interest cost alone.
Represents minority interests in profit, not interest expense.
Same concept as non-controlling interest; not interest expense.
Same as above in comprehensive income context; not interest expense.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental disclosure of lease interest; component rather than total interest expense.
Equity line for minority interests; not an interest expense.
Same as above; equity minority interest, not interest cost.
Balance sheet accrued interest liability; not the period expense itself.
Label is generic and appears unused (all nan); unclear if it represents period interest expense; less reliable than income statement interest lines.

variables.notes: Using the aggregate Interest Expense line, which matches the sum of lease and non-lease components.

candidates.row_label: Fair value (loss)/gain from equity financial asset
candidates.why: Income statement fair value movement; not a balance sheet equity total.

candidates.row_label: Remeasurement of equity interest in joint venture
candidates.why: Income statement remeasurement gain/loss; not total book equity.
Represents profit attributable to equity holders, not the stock of equity on the balance sheet.

candidates.row_label: Equity investments at FVOCI - fair value loss
candidates.why: OCI fair value loss; not an equity total line.

candidates.row_label: Equity financial assets, at fair value
candidates.why: Asset line for equity investments; not shareholders' equity.

candidates.row_label: Equity Financial Assets at Fair Value
candidates.why: Current asset line for equity investments; not equity capital.
Represents equity attributable to owners of the company; close to book equity but excludes non-controlling interests; could be used but there is also an explicit total shareholders equity line.
Explicit total shareholders' equity line including components; best match for book equity definition.

variables.notes: Using explicit Total shareholders equity as book equity measure.

candidates.why: Income statement allocation of profit to non-controlling interests; indicates presence of minorities but not the balance sheet amount.
Duplicate/alternative label for non-controlling interest in income; same amounts as above.
OCI/comprehensive income portion attributable to non-controlling interests; again profit allocation, not balance sheet stock.
Balance sheet line showing the stock of non-controlling interests; best representation of minority interest in equity.
Alternate label for the same balance sheet minority interest; appears to duplicate Non-controlling interests.

variables.notes: Using the balance sheet Non-controlling interests line as the minority interest (MIB) measure.
